evals.prompt: Configure the ML anomaly detection job for the Lowe's inventory shrink demo scene.
evals.expected_output: lowes-ml-config.json with anomaly detection job, datafeed, and injection plan targeting store 1842 SKUs 174239/182041/196723. lowes-ml-setup.md with step-by-step setup guide.
assertions: Job partitions by store_id and/or sku_group
Bucket span is 1h (matches intraday inventory drift narrative)
Injection plan specifies store 1842 as target entity
Injection plan specifies 2-3 hour pre-demo timing
Setup guide includes verification step: check swimlane before demo

evals.prompt: Set up the ML config for Deutsche Telekom SOC-T. We want to demo an anomaly in the authentication data — an IP making way more login attempts than normal.
evals.expected_output: dt-soct-ml-config.json using high_count PARTITION BY source_ip, 15m bucket, injection spec for a single anomalous IP. Setup guide with 24h training requirement.
assertions: Job uses high_count or count detector (not mean)
Bucket span is 5m, 10m, or 15m (auth event granularity)
Training data requirement is at least 24 hours
Injection plan specifies a single source IP not seen in training period
Setup guide references the existing 131 ML jobs on the cluster (coordinate, don't conflict)
